productDisplayName: Puma Men Tech Graphic Hooded Jacket
description: CompositionBlue Jacket with front zip opening, body made of polyester fleece with rib made of 98% cotton and 2% elastane, has a hood with elasticated toggle straps, long sleeves with ribbed cuffs, two hand-warmer pockets on front, chunky rubber zipper pull, branding on left lower arm, subtle striped rubber print on the front and a ribbed hem with brand tab on right sideFitComfortWash careGentle machine wash in lukewarm waterDo not bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanCool ironThis stylish zipped and hooded sweater from puma will keep you warm in the winter chill.  Cosy polyester fleece feels soft next to your skin and provides a thermal layer.  The fabric has a slight sheen to it and when added to the green elastic drawcords at the hood the jacket takes on a sporty feel.  Wear it with puma jeans and hightop Basketball shoes to demonstrate that Sports Brands have the best style when it comes to casual dressing, or use it as an extra layer when you're training in the cold and misty early mornings.Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
